fix_plans.title: Extend training schedule to converge tail
fix_plans.content: Edit hparams.py: in the Hparams dataclass change max_epochs from 5 to 15 (leave limit_train_batches=32, limit_val_batches=32, val_check_interval=1.0 unchanged). The probe's conclude() computes tail_mean over the LAST 5 epochs, but the run currently only produces 5 epochs, so the warm-up epochs (epoch 0 leakage 0.07-0.12) dominate the tail average and never let the converged low-leakage epochs (round 4 already reached 0.0265-0.0418 by the final epoch) be the only thing averaged. EarlyStopping patience is 10 (monitor val/F1, mode max), so it will not cut a 15-epoch run short prematurely. With 15 epochs the conditional-MI trajectory keeps descending as the classifier finishes fitting per-attribute visual evidence, and tail_mean averages epochs 10-14 (the converged regime) instead of the noisy first 5, which is expected to pull tail_mean below the 0.03 standard threshold without touching loss or model code. This is the training-schedule / metric-aggregation angle and is orthogonal to every prior change.

fix_plans.title: Strengthen decoupled weight decay
fix_plans.content: Edit lightningmodules/classification.py, function configure_optimizers(): change AdamW(self.net.parameters(), lr=self.lr, weight_decay=1e-2) to weight_decay=5e-2. The AdamW switch (change_log_4) produced the single best result in the history (tail_mean 0.0368, min 0.0265), confirming that decoupled L2 directly suppresses the sharply-tuned weights that encode the Male x target co-occurrence shortcut measured by the conditional-MI probe. The subsequent dropout (log 5) and batch-decorrelation-penalty (log 6) changes regressed the metric, so this plan instead sharpens the one lever that demonstrably helped, raising weight_decay 5x to a still-safe value for ViT-small fine-tuning. Heavier shrinkage pushes the model further toward low-norm, shape/texture-based features and away from memorizing the gender->attribute correlation, lowering residual I(pred_target; Male | true_target). Single-line, self-contained regularization change.

fix_plans.title: Freeze backbone, train classifier head only
fix_plans.content: Edit lightningmodules/classification.py, in Classification.__init__() immediately after self.net = timm.create_model(...): freeze the pretrained backbone so only the final classification head adapts. Concretely, obtain the head module via head = self.net.get_classifier(), set p.requires_grad = False for every parameter in self.net.parameters(), then set p.requires_grad = True for every parameter in head.parameters(); leave configure_optimizers() passing self.net.parameters() (frozen params simply receive no gradient). The ImageNet-pretrained ViT-small features are gender-agnostic general visual representations; the 5-epoch full fine-tune is what bends those features into the Male x target shortcut the conditional-MI probe detects. Training only the 40-way linear head on top of frozen, un-corrupted features prevents the backbone from learning the spurious correlation while still letting the head learn each attribute from the fixed feature basis, which is expected to sharply reduce I(pred_target; Male | true_target). This is the transfer-learning / model-capacity angle, distinct from optimizer, data-sampling, augmentation, and loss-penalty changes already tried.
